findings.title: ROADMAP.md M-005 cites superseded ADR-0006 instead of ADR-0011
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md line 105 lists 'adrs: [ADR-0006]' for milestone M-005 (Voice-discovery + Retell). ADR-0006 was superseded by ADR-0011 on 2026-06-04. The 2026-06-07 nightly audit corrected the Q3 section reference but missed the M-005 milestone block. ADR-0011 is the canonical voice-platform decision that governs M-005.
findings.fix_sketch: Change 'adrs: [ADR-0006]' to 'adrs: [ADR-0011]' in the M-005 block.

findings.title: SPRINT.md frontmatter missing last_updated field
findings.detail: SPRINT.md frontmatter does not include a 'last_updated:' field, while all other spec files follow this convention. The footer shows 'Last updated: 2026-05-21' and reconciled_at is also 2026-05-21, so the value is unambiguous.

findings.title: ARCHITECTURE.md related_adrs missing ADR-0004 (build-full-pipeline-before-client-1)
findings.detail: ARCHITECTURE.md frontmatter related_adrs lists [ADR-0001, ADR-0002, ADR-0003, ADR-0005, ADR-0007, ADR-0009, ADR-0010] but omits ADR-0004 (Build full pipeline before client #1). ADR-0004 directly informs ARCHITECTURE.md invariant 3 (Issues as unit of work) and the pipeline-first strategy described in the doc. The 2026-06-04 audit added ADR-0005 and ADR-0009 but missed ADR-0004.
findings.fix_sketch: Add ADR-0004 to the related_adrs array. SKIPPED by nightly audit: ARCHITECTURE.md has 'status: accepted' in frontmatter — per AGENTS.md §7 Ask-first rule, this edit requires human sign-off before merging.
